The '''S-87 sensor suite''' was a powerful sensor package designed by [[Gavvatronics]]. It was capable of scanning for different kinds of gases. One was installed in the [[YT-700 transport|YT-700 Transport]] ''[[Jackpot]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|5|Wind Raiders of Taloraan}} {{1stm}}
